summary: Test suite covers main happy paths (all bump types, both file formats, basic integration through act) but lacks error handling and edge case coverage. No unit tests for individual functions; no error scenarios tested (missing files, invalid versions, malformed commits). Fixture files referenced but not shown; fixture creation/usage invisible. Act integration design is reasonable (workflow structure tests independent, integration tests centralized in setup_file) but tight coupling makes failure isolation difficult. Changelog assertions weak (only checks for 'CHANGELOG' string, not format/content). Would catch major breakage but miss subtle bugs in edge cases, error messages, and changelog formatting.
